title: Backend API for POS operations
description: Build FastAPI backend APIs for product listing, cart management (add, update, remove items), and order processing. Use in-memory storage for MVP product and cart data, with Pydantic v2 for data validation.
acceptance_criteria: Health endpoint returns status 'ok'
API to list all available products works correctly
API to add a product to the cart works and validates input
API to update product quantity in the cart works and validates input
API to remove a product from the cart works
API to process a checkout (create an order) works
All API responses conform to defined structured schemas

title: Frontend POS interface
description: Develop a React TypeScript web interface for displaying products, managing a shopping cart, and completing the checkout process. The UI must integrate with the backend APIs for all data operations.
acceptance_criteria: Products are fetched from the backend and displayed on the UI
Users can add products to the cart from the product list
Users can update quantities of items in the cart
Users can remove items from the cart
The cart total updates dynamically as items are added/removed/updated
A checkout button initiates the order process via the backend API
Basic visual feedback is provided for user actions (e.g., item added to cart)

title: Automated testing and Docker deployment setup
description: Set up automated unit tests for both backend and frontend components. Create Dockerfiles for the FastAPI backend and React frontend, along with a Docker Compose configuration to orchestrate and run the entire application stack.
acceptance_criteria: Backend unit tests are implemented using Pytest and pass successfully
Frontend unit tests are implemented using Jest and pass successfully
Dockerfiles for both backend and frontend are created and build successfully
A Docker Compose file is configured to run both services
The entire application stack can be brought up and down using Docker Compose
Frontend service can successfully communicate with the backend service within the Docker environment
